messages.text: A stormcall totem crackles nearby, and static fury sharpens every strike you make.
Crackling storm-energy from a stormcall totem wreathes {name}.
The stormcall totem falls silent and the crackling fury drains from you.
The crackling storm-energy around {name} fades to stillness.
{name} is wreathed in crackling energy from a stormcall totem.
